/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/mocha-quickjs.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/mocha-quickjs.dir/src/quickjs_glue.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mocha-quickjs.dir/home/savunma/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/mocha-framework/packages/bridge-qt/src/qt_bridge.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mocha-quickjs.dir/home/savunma/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/mocha-framework/packages/bridge-qt/src/mocha_list_model.cpp.o" -o mocha-quickjs  /home/savunma/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/mocha-framework/packages/bridge-quickjs/quickjs/libquickjs.a /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.11.1 -lpthread -ldl -lm /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
